nasb.text: But women will be preserved through the bearing of children if they continue in faith and love and sanctity with self-restraint.

esv.text: Yet she will be saved through childbearing—if they continue in faith and love and holiness, with self-control.

cnv.text: 然而女人要是常常存著信心、愛心、聖潔自律，在她生育的事上必定得救。

ccb.text: 不过，女人如果持守信心和爱心，圣洁自律，就必在生育的事上得救。

csbs.text: 不过女人如果在自制中持守信仰、爱心、圣洁，就会在生养儿女中得以保全。
